name: Puny Penguin
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>子</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>コ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>型</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ガタ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ペンギン
desc: When this card is sent from the field to the Graveyard after being flipped face-up: Target 1 "Penguin" monster in your Graveyard, except "Puny Penguin"; Special Summon that target in face-up Attack Position or face-down Defense Position.
mnst_eff: When this card is sent from the field to the Graveyard after being flipped face-up: Target 1 "Penguin" monster in your Graveyard, except "Puny Penguin"; Special Summon that target in face-up Attack Position or face-down Defense Position.
eff: When this card is sent from the field to the Graveyard after being flipped face-up: Target 1 "Penguin" monster in your Graveyard, except "Puny Penguin"; Special Summon that target in face-up Attack Position or face-down Defense Position.
